properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

methods.name: remove(): void
methods.description: Removes this ongoing progress item and also removes it from its parent.

methods.name: complete(): void
methods.description: Sets state to COMPLETED and also removes it from its parent.

methods.name: fault(): void
methods.description: Sets state to FAILED and also removes it from its parent.
